title: parah #6509
definition:
1) to bear fruit, be fruitful, branch off
    1a) (Qal) to bear fruit, be fruitful
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to cause to bear fruit
        1b2) to make fruitful
        1b3) to show fruitfulness, bear fruit
nasbUsage:

    NASB:  to bear fruit, be fruitful
